prompt: Medieval illuminated manuscript style Pinterest pin. Deep lapis lazuli blue background (#1B2A6B) with golden celestial elements. In the center: a golden sun face and crescent moon intertwined — representing clarity and union. Small golden 6-pointed stars scattered across the dark blue sky. At the bottom: two small golden silhouettes walking together through a desert landscape toward light. Ornamental golden border frame in medieval manuscript style around the edges. Text in elegant serif font, golden color on dark blue: 'Кто эта, восходящая от пустыни, опирающаяся на своего возлюбленного?' and below smaller: '— Песнь Песней 8:5'. Very bottom: '@homodivinus' in small golden text. Style: Byzantine mosaic meets medieval Book of Hours. Color palette: deep ultramarine blue, gold leaf, warm cream. Sacred, mystical, contemplative. Vertical format.
